ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neos" (
  "neo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NEO */,
  "neo_reference_id" TEXT /* Reference ID of the NEO */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the NEO */,
  "absolute_magnitude" REAL /* Absolute magnitude of the NEO */,
  "est_dia_km_min" REAL /* Estimated diameter in kilometers (minimum) */,
  "est_dia_km_max" REAL /* Estimated diameter in kilometers (maximum) */,
  "est_dia_m_min" REAL /* Estimated diameter in meters (minimum) */,
  "est_dia_m_max" REAL /* Estimated diameter in meters (maximum) */,
  "est_dia_miles_min" REAL /* Estimated diameter in miles (minimum) */,
  "est_dia_miles_max" REAL /* Estimated diameter in miles (maximum) */,
  "est_dia_feet_min" REAL /* Estimated diameter in feet (minimum) */,
  "est_dia_feet_max" REAL /* Estimated diameter in feet (maximum) */,
  "orbit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the orbit */,
  "orbit_determination_date" TEXT /* Date of orbit determination */,
  "orbit_uncertainty" INTEGER /* Orbit uncertainty parameter */,
  "minimum_orbit_intersection" REAL /* Minimum orbit intersection parameter */,
  "jupiter_tisserand_invariant" REAL /* Jupiter Tisserand invariant */,
  "epoch_osculation" TEXT /* Epoch of osculation */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the orbit */,
  "semi_major_axis" REAL /* Semi-major axis of the orbit */,
  "inclination" REAL /* Inclination of the orbit */,
  "asc_node_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the ascending node */,
  "orbital_period" REAL /* Orbital period of the NEO */,
  "perihelion_distance" REAL /* Perihelion distance of the orbit */,
  "perihelion_arg" REAL /* Argument of perihelion */,
  "aphelion_distance" REAL /* Aphelion distance of the orbit */,
  "perihelion_time" TEXT /* Time of perihelion */,
  "mean_anomaly" REAL /* Mean anomaly of the orbit */,
  "mean_motion" REAL /* Mean motion of the orbit */,
  "equinox" TEXT /* Equinox of the orbit */,
  "hazardous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the NEO is hazardous */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the NEO was first discovered */,
  "discovery_location" TEXT /* Location where the NEO was first discovered */,
  "discovery_telescope" TEXT /* Telescope or instrument used for the discovery */,
  "last_observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last observation of the NEO */,
  "last_observation_telescope" TEXT /* Telescope or instrument used for the last observation */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Estimated composition of the NEO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "close_approaches" (
  "approach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each close approach */,
  "neo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NEO involved in the close approach */,
  "close_approach_date" TEXT /* Date of the close approach */,
  "epoch_date_close_approach" TEXT /* Epoch date (in milliseconds) of the close approach */,
  "relative_velocity_km_per_sec" REAL /* Relative velocity of the NEO in kilometers per second */,
  "relative_velocity_km_per_hr" REAL /* Relative velocity of the NEO in kilometers per hour */,
  "relative_velocity_miles_per_hr" REAL /* Relative velocity of the NEO in miles per hour */,
  "miss_dist_astronomical" REAL /* Miss distance in astronomical units */,
  "miss_dist_lunar" REAL /* Miss distance in lunar distances */,
  "miss_dist_km" REAL /* Miss distance in kilometers */,
  "miss_dist_miles" REAL /* Miss distance in miles */,
  "orbiting_body" TEXT /* Body being orbited during the close approach */,
  "miss_distance_au" REAL /* Miss distance in astronomical units */,
  "miss_distance_km_per_au" REAL /* Miss distance in kilometers per astronomical unit */,
  "miss_distance_miles_per_au" REAL /* Miss distance in miles per astronomical unit */,
  "hazard_level" TEXT /* Level of hazard associated with the close approach */,
  "impact_probability" REAL /* Probability of impact during the close approach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_close_approaches_neo_id FOREIGN KEY ("neo_id") REFERENCES neos ("neo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orbits" (
  "orbit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orbit */,
  "neo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NEO associated with the orbit */,
  "orbit_determination_date" TEXT /* Date of orbit determination */,
  "orbit_uncertainty" INTEGER /* Orbit uncertainty parameter */,
  "minimum_orbit_intersection" REAL /* Minimum orbit intersection parameter */,
  "jupiter_tisserand_invariant" REAL /* Jupiter Tisserand invariant */,
  "epoch_osculation" TEXT /* Epoch of osculation */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the orbit */,
  "semi_major_axis" REAL /* Semi-major axis of the orbit */,
  "inclination" REAL /* Inclination of the orbit */,
  "asc_node_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the ascending node */,
  "orbital_period" REAL /* Orbital period of the NEO */,
  "perihelion_distance" REAL /* Perihelion distance of the orbit */,
  "perihelion_arg" REAL /* Argument of perihelion */,
  "aphelion_distance" REAL /* Aphelion distance of the orbit */,
  "perihelion_time" TEXT /* Time of perihelion */,
  "mean_anomaly" REAL /* Mean anomaly of the orbit */,
  "mean_motion" REAL /* Mean motion of the orbit */,
  "equinox" TEXT /* Equinox of the orbit */,
  "perihelion_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the perihelion */,
  "perihelion_argument" REAL /* Argument of the perihelion */,
  "aphelion_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the aphelion */,
  "aphelion_argument" REAL /* Argument of the aphelion */,
  "orbital_inclination" REAL /* Inclination of the orbit in degrees */,
  "orbital_eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the orbit in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orbit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orbits_neo_id FOREIGN KEY ("neo_id") REFERENCES neos ("neo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, public) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to a roles table for more granular role management */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "neo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NEO being accessed */,
  "approach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the close approach being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_neo_id FOREIGN KEY ("neo_id") REFERENCES neos ("neo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_approach_id FOREIGN KEY ("approach_id") REFERENCES close_approaches ("approach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "neo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NEO involved in the close approach */,
  "approach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the close approach */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved, dismissed) */,
  "alert_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was resolved */,
  "alert_resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_neo_id FOREIGN KEY ("neo_id") REFERENCES neos ("neo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_approach_id FOREIGN KEY ("approach_id") REFERENCES close_approaches ("approach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazardous_neos" (
  "hazardous_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazardous NEO entry */,
  "neo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NEO */,
  "hazardous_level" TEXT /* Level of hazard (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "risk_assessment" TEXT /* Risk assessment details */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  "impact_likelihood" REAL /* Probability of impact with Earth */,
  "impact_consequences" TEXT /* Consequences of a potential impact (e.g., damage, casualties) */,
  "impact_mitigation_plan" TEXT /* Plan for mitigating the impact, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hazardous_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hazardous_neos_neo_id FOREIGN KEY ("neo_id") REFERENCES neos ("neo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neo_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "neo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NEO being observed */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the observation */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., visual, radar) */,
  "observation_data" TEXT /* Observation data (e.g., images, measurements) */,
  "observation_location" TEXT /* Location where the observation was made */,
  "observation_instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for the observation (e.g., telescope, radar) */,
  "observation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neo_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neo_observations_neo_id FOREIGN KEY ("neo_id") REFERENCES neos ("neo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the observer belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the observer */,
  "observer_status" TEXT /* Status of the observer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "observer_role" TEXT /* Role of the observer (e.g., scientist, amateur) */,
  "observer_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the observer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neo_risks" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "neo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NEO */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "probability_of_impact" REAL /* Probability of impact with Earth */,
  "consequences_of_impact" TEXT /* Consequences of impact (e.g., damage, casualties) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the risk assessment was last updated */,
  "risk_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "risk_assessment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the risk assessment */,
  "risk_mitigation_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy for mitigating the risk, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neo_risks_neo_id FOREIGN KEY ("neo_id") REFERENCES neos ("neo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neo_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "neo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NEO */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the image was uploaded */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1024x768) */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neo_images_neo_id FOREIGN KEY ("neo_id") REFERENCES neos ("neo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neo_spectra" (
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectrum */,
  "neo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NEO */,
  "spectrum_data" TEXT /* Spectral data (e.g., CSV file path) */,
  "spectrum_type" TEXT /* Type of spectrum (e.g., infrared, visible) */,
  "spectrum_date" TEXT /* Date and time the spectrum was recorded */,
  "spectrum_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the spectrum data */,
  "spectrum_instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used to record the spectrum (e.g., spectrometer) */,
  "spectrum_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the spectrum data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectrum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neo_spectra_neo_id FOREIGN KEY ("neo_id") REFERENCES neos ("neo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neo_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "neo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NEO */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "comment_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the comment (e.g., public, private) */,
  "comment_votes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes or downvotes for the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neo_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neo_comments_neo_id FOREIGN KEY ("neo_id") REFERENCES neos ("neo_id")
)
